default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Hims and GrowthX to align on project scope, workflow, and next steps for content generation partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hims aims to ramp up with \~1000 pages quarterly, focusing initially on drug info and comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [GrowthX to adapt their AI-driven content workflow to Hims' needs, with phased approach for medical expert integration](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Contract flexibility desired, but with 12-month volume estimate for approvals](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Additional info needed from Hims on current byline process and review bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

## Topics

### Project Scope and Ramp-up

  - [Initial focus on streamlining workflow and integrations with Intentful and Hims' CMS](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Start with existing page templates: drug info and drug comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Target volume: \~1000 pages quarterly](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Phased approach: GrowthX to handle content up to medical handoff initially, then potentially integrate medical experts](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### GrowthX Workflow and Capabilities

  - [AI-driven system with adaptable workflows coded for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Example researcher workflow shared, demonstrating multi-step process including source vetting](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Capability to staff medical experts through robust recruiting engine (4000+ candidates)](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Need Hims' guidance on vetting medical expert profiles](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Content Review and Bylines

  - [Hims current process: 4 main touchpoints including SEO briefing, editorial team, writer, and medical expert review](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes learning from Hims' current medical review process to potentially automate or streamline](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Discussion on how to handle MD bylines and whether GrowthX can take ownership of this process](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Caution raised about Contentful CMS potentially impacting build times with large page volumes](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Suggestion to consider alternative approaches for serving high-volume content sections](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Request for access to Hims' list of preferred sources for research adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

### Next Steps and Timeline

  - [GrowthX to complete answering Hims' questionnaire](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Aim for contract finalization next week](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Target mid-February kickoff (potentially February 18th or 24th)](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Hims to provide details on current byline process and review bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Hims to send information on current byline process and medical review bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [GrowthX to finish answering Hims' questionnaire and incorporate into SOW](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Both parties to work towards finalizing contract next week](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Schedule technical discussion between engineering teams if needed](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Hims to provide access to their list of preferred sources for research](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Tentatively plan for mid-February project kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/agrpCFsCwForvPxYyfvxGgpViXzB3ETu?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)

action_items.description: Connect w/ editorial team, compile one-sheeter on current byline process  (writers, medical experts, review steps, final approval)
Outline high-level current internal review processes, esp. medical/legal.  Include medical claims guidelines, legal review criteria (2+ bullet points)
Review Marcel's comments on Contentful integration, assess potential  build time issues w/ engineering team
Share list of trusted sources currently used internally for research  (if available)
